summary: Remediated romance-arc.json to address character-auditor findings CHAR-GATE-001-F001 and F002: (1) Expanded vulnerabilityLadder from 8 to 11 moments (6 for CHAR-001, 5 for CHAR-002), exceeding INV-059/T21 requirement of 5-8 per lead; (2) Created obstacleInventory with 16 obstacles tagged as internal (9, 56.2%) or external (7, 43.8%), satisfying INV-046/T8 requirement of 50%+ internal resistance. New vulnerability moments: CHAR-002 Chapter 9 (providing care beyond contract necessity), CHAR-001 Chapter 10 (asking question with no tactical value), CHAR-001 Chapter 19 (naming fear aloud). Obstacle inventory enumerates all romantic obstacles from arc stages with precise manifestation points and resolution chapters.

complianceVerification.INV-059/T21: PASS — 11 vulnerability moments total (CHAR-001: 6, CHAR-002: 5), exceeds minimum 10 for dual-lead slow burn
complianceVerification.INV-046/T8: PASS — 16 obstacles with 9 internal (56.2%), exceeds minimum 50% internal/psychological requirement
